scripts.setup: npm --prefix apps/delivery-api ci && npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web ci
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run build && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run prisma:generate && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run lint && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run test && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run test
scripts.check:workspace: npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run lint && npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run test && npm --prefix apps/route-ops-web run build && npm --prefix apps/delivery-api run check:workspace
